description: Official LaTeX template for the International Symposium on Particle Image Velocimetry (ISPIV) 2023. Provides a one-column, letter-size layout with large bold title/author/affiliation blocks, a branded first-page fancy header with symposium name and dates, custom abstract and acknowledgments sections, subfigure support, and a dedicated bibliography style, based on a custom ISPIV2023_Template_Paper_Class document class.
